sentence_reviews.text: LSTMs and GRUs use learned gates to regulate writing, forgetting, and exposing recurrent state, reducing the vanishing-gradient limitations of basic RNNs.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Hochreiter & Schmidhuber LSTM paper for gated memory and gradient issues; Deep Learning gated RNN sections.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited node/reference evidence directly supports the architecture description at this level of specificity.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of LSTMs & GRUs is to connect Recurrent neural networks, Gating & multiplicative control to downstream capabilities including xLSTM & linear-recurrent hybrids, Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection.
